name: Mulan

skills.name: Great Wall Guardian
skills.description:
Gains Movement Speed when using dual swords.
Skills and Basic Attacks apply marks to enemies. At 5 stacks, the marks detonate, dealing damage and inflicting silence and slow on the enemy.

skills.name: Snaking Strike
skills.description:
Dashes twice in the target direction, with the ability to change the direction of the 2nd dash.
Deals damage to enemies in her path.
If the skill hits an enemy, it can be used again before it enters cooldown.

skills.name: Dagger Waltz
skills.description:
Throws a sword in the target direction that slows and deals damage to enemies within range when it reaches its max range.
If Mulan touches the sword, she retrieves it, reducing the cooldown of Skill 2.

skills.name: Blooming Blade
skills.description:
Deals damage to enemies within range, gaining damage reduction during this time.
Enhances herself, gaining Physical Attack for a period of time.
Switches to heavy sword form.

skillsZh.name: 長城巡守者
skillsZh.description:
使用雙劍時增加移動速度。
技能和普攻對敵人施加標記，5層後標記消失，並對敵人造成傷害、沉默和減速效果。

skillsZh.name: 空裂斬
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向進行兩段突進，可控制第二段突進方向。
對沿途敵人造成傷害。
命中敵人後，可在技能進入冷卻前再次使用。

skillsZh.name: 旋舞之華
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向投擲輕劍，達到最遠距離會對範圍內敵人造成傷害和減速效果。
花木蘭到達輕劍位置會收起輕劍並減少2技能冷卻。

skillsZh.name: 綻放刀鋒
skillsZh.description:
對自身周圍一定範圍內敵人造成傷害，期間獲得傷害減免。
強化自身，強化期間增加物理攻擊。
切換為重劍形態。

tips: Build: Cuirass of Savagery, Pure Sky, Demonsbane.
tipsZh: 花木蘭（對抗路）：梯度 B，勝率 50.71%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：暴烈之甲、純淨蒼穹、破魔刀.

patchHistory.change: Increased damage reduction while wielding the heavy sword and the damage of Skill 1 when wielding both heavy and dual swords.
patchHistory.detail: We made Mulan tankier while wielding her heavy sword and increased her overall damage output. Hopefully she will now perform better in team fights

Mulan's two stances give her mobility, burst damage, crowd control, and damage reduction. She can be used in many different lineups to attack many different opponents.In the current version, when Mulan gains the advantage, she becomes very difficult to counter.We hope that by reducing her base Health, we can give her less room for mistakes.

patchHistory.change: Reduced the damage dealt by her Skill 2 when she is using a heavy sword, and reduced the damage dealt by her Ultimate when she is using either weapon.
patchHistory.detail:
Reduced the damage dealt by her Skill 2 when she is using a heavy sword, and reduced the damage dealt by her Ultimate when she is using either weapon.
Although the Resistance gained from the Boots of Resistance was previously lowered by only 5%, this change allowed many players to have Mulan unleash complete skill combos against enemies. Since very few heroes are capable of withstanding such an assault, we have lowered the damage dealt from her Skill 2 when using a heavy sword and her Ultimate, in order to balance out the buff granted by the Boots of Resistance.

patchHistory.change: Reduced the damage of Skill 1 when using dual swords or heavy sword.
patchHistory.detail: Mulan's skill mechanics grant her mobility, crowd control immunity, burst damage, and crowd control. Different skill combinations let her face different opponents and adapt to evolving situations on the battlefield. Heroes like Mulan have enormous potential, and skilled players can do incredible things with them. We want Mulan players to have more of a challenge before taking over matches, rather than easily suppressing rivals with relatively simple and fixed tactics early on.

patchHistoryZh.change: 增加重劍形態的免傷效果，同時提升1技能在輕劍和重劍形態的傷害
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「提升花木蘭重劍的坦度和整體輸出能力，希望她在團戰中有更好的表現。」
花木蘭的兩個形態使得她同時擁有機動性，爆發傷害，控制能力以及傷害減免能力，她可以適配很多陣容，應對很多對手。在當前版本中，花木蘭一旦獲取優勢就會變得難以反制。我們希望通過降低花木蘭的生命，來降低她的容錯性。

patchHistoryZh.change: 削弱重劍形態下的2技能，削弱2種形態下大招的傷害
patchHistoryZh.detail:
削弱重劍形態下的2技能，削弱2種形態下大招的傷害
雖然之前抵抗之靴的韌性僅調低了5%，但這樣的調整卻足以讓花木蘭完整地對敵人打出連招，由於很少有英雄能徹底扛住那段連招的傷害，我們希望適度降低花木蘭重劍形態下2技能的揮砍及大招傷害，藉此平衡因抵抗之靴調整而受益的花木蘭。

patchHistoryZh.change: Reduced the damage of Skill 1 when using dual swords or heavy sword.
patchHistoryZh.detail: Mulan's skill mechanics grant her mobility, crowd control immunity, burst damage, and crowd control. Different skill combinations let her face different opponents and adapt to evolving situations on the battlefield. Heroes like Mulan have enormous potential, and skilled players can do incredible things with them. We want Mulan players to have more of a challenge before taking over matches, rather than easily suppressing rivals with relatively simple and fixed tactics early on.

faqs.question: Is Mulan good in current season?
faqs.answer: Mulan is Tier B Assassin with 50.71% win rate, 0.34% pick rate, and 0.03% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Mulan build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Cuirass of Savagery, Pure Sky, Demonsbane, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny, Starbreaker.

faqs.question: How to counter Mulan?
faqs.answer: Pick Diaochan, Heino, Hou Yi. Strong into Liang, Mi Yue, Nuwa.

faqsZh.question: 花木蘭 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 花木蘭 為 B 梯度，勝率 50.71%、選取 0.34%、禁用 0.03%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 花木蘭 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：暴烈之甲、純淨蒼穹、破魔刀、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命、碎星錘.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 花木蘭？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Diaochan、Heino、Hou Yi。花木蘭 克制 Liang、Mi Yue、Nuwa。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Liang, Mi Yue, Nuwa. Weak into: Diaochan, Heino, Hou Yi.

guide.overview: Mulan is a Medium Assassin (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.1% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Mulan: Gains Movement Speed when using dual swords.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Fortitude, Axe of Torment, Cuirass of Savagery, then complete Starbreaker, Pure Sky, Succubus Cloak. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Mulan's Assassin kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Snaking Strike → Dagger Waltz → Blooming Blade (Dual Swords Form) → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Blooming Blade (Dual Swords Form) (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Dagger Waltz provides mobility or stick—max first. Snaking Strike second for damage. Blooming Blade (Dual Swords Form) on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Snaking Strike → Dagger Waltz → Blooming Blade (Dual Swords Form) → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Blooming Blade (Dual Swords Form) after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Mulan sits at Tier B globally (51.1% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Mulan vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Mulan has +1.4% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Mulan when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Mulan vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Mulan has +0.4% WR vs Musashi in Camp data. Choose Mulan when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Mulan excels into Liang, Mi Yue, Nuwa. Avoid blind picking into Diaochan, Heino, Hou Yi without team peel.
